evidence: Live zh Big Five result page showed the result recovery banner eyebrow `结果找回` and helper text `这不会阻塞当前免费结果预览。保存后，我们会把访问链接发送到你的邮箱，方便换设备或稍后继续查看。`; local search maps this to app/(localized)/[locale]/(app)/result/[id]/ResultClient.tsx.
why_not_current_pr_scope: PR14 scope is limited to Big Five renderer files and contracts. Changing the generic result client recovery banner would affect non-Big-Five result pages and requires a separate result-shell UX scope.
recommended_follow_up: Open a scoped fap-web PR for result recovery banner UX, with assertions covering Big Five and non-Big-Five result pages.

evidence: The manifest command `pnpm test:contract` failed before running tests because the local Codex runtime pnpm wrapper attempted `pnpm install` and hit ERR_PNPM_IGNORED_BUILDS for esbuild, sharp, and unrs-resolver. The equivalent `corepack pnpm test:contract` completed successfully with all contract shards passing.
why_not_current_pr_scope: OPS-08 only adds a read-only GSC monitoring artifact generator, generated docs/csv/json, one contract, sidecar, and train ledger updates. The local pnpm approve-builds state is machine/runtime configuration outside repository scope and predates the PR.
recommended_follow_up: Normalize local Codex pnpm wrapper approval state or run repository checks through corepack pnpm, matching CI behavior, before requiring bare pnpm locally.

evidence: pnpm test:contract rewrote docs/seo/personality/mbti-cms-04-top-profile-content-assets-2026-07-04.json and .md with a fresh generated timestamp during full contract validation.

evidence: After rebasing IQ-METHOD-06 onto origin/main a5d0798d, `pnpm test:contract` failed only in tests/contracts/mbti-asset-ops-09-personality-asset-sop.contract.test.ts. Its OPS-09 scope test compares committedScopeFiles() for the current IQ branch and rejects IQ-METHOD-06 files including generated/iq-method-pages-zh-cn-v0.2/PR_TRAIN_INDEX.json, generated/iq-method-pages-zh-cn-v0.2/pages/06-iq-test-privacy-data-boundary/**, tests/contracts/helpers/currentPrScope.ts, tests/contracts/iq-method-05-content-asset.contract.test.ts, and tests/contracts/iq-method-06-content-asset.contract.test.ts.
why_not_current_pr_scope: IQ-METHOD-06 scope is limited to the privacy/data-boundary CMS Article draft-review asset package, PR_TRAIN_INDEX, IQ-METHOD-05/06 contract harness, currentPrScope, docs/codex metadata, and sidecar issue records. Changing the MBTI-ASSET-OPS-09 contract is an external train-forward compatibility fix for a previously merged MBTI PR and would expand this PR beyond one scope.

resolution: Resolved by fap-web PR #1601, which made tests/contracts/mbti-asset-ops-09-personality-asset-sop.contract.test.ts enforce OPS-09 scope only on branch codex/mbti-asset-ops-09-personality-asset-sop.
